MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
J. Michael Phelps, Esq. 433-3733 for Plaintiff and opposing party
No appearance by Defendants who were directed to appear by virtue of the Court's tentative ruling of hearing required -- parties instructed to bring witnesses. Therefore, the Court DENIED defendants' motion to quash service of process. (JJM/md) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
